name: The Unveiled
description: The character finds a truth that would shatter someone they care about. The knowledge is undeniable.
hopePole: The Revelation — truth shared to protect and liberate.
tollPole: The Theft — truth hoarded to control and dominate.
setup: [PLACEHOLDER] A mirror appears before you, but it doesn't show your reflection. It shows a door — sealed, ancient, radiating with hidden knowledge. Beyond it lies something the galaxy forgot. Something someone buried on purpose.

rounds.prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] Beyond the door, you find a record — undeniable proof of a betrayal by someone you trusted. The truth would destroy their reputation, but it would also free those they've deceived.

choices.label: Reveal the truth to those who were deceived
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] The truth hurts. But the deceived finally understand what was done to them. They can begin to heal.

choices.label: Keep the truth as leverage
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You fold the record away. This knowledge is power — and power is best held close.

choices.label: Confront the betrayer privately first
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You face them alone. Their eyes tell you they expected this day would come.

rounds.prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] The vision deepens. You discover a second truth — something about yourself. A memory you buried. A thing you did, or failed to do, that set this chain of events in motion.

choices.label: Accept the truth and share it — no more secrets
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] The weight lifts. The truth about yourself is harder than the truth about others, but it's honest.

choices.label: Bury it deeper — this one stays hidden
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You lock the memory away again. Some truths are too dangerous — especially the ones about yourself.

choices.label: File it away — you'll deal with it when you're ready
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You acknowledge it without acting on it. Not all truths demand immediate reckoning.

rounds.prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] The final door opens. Behind it: the complete truth — a web of cause and effect spanning years. You can share it all, hoard it all, or destroy it so no one ever knows.

choices.label: Share everything — the galaxy deserves to know
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] The truth flows out like water from a broken dam. It will reshape everything. But at least it's real.

choices.label: Archive it for yourself — knowledge is the ultimate weapon
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You seal the archive. You are now the only one who knows. That makes you the most dangerous person in the room.

choices.label: Share what's needed, keep what's dangerous
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You curate the truth. Some things the galaxy needs. Some things it's not ready for.

resolutions.light: [PLACEHOLDER] The mirror clears. You emerge from the Hall carrying the truth in the open — a burden shared is a burden halved. The light of revelation burns away the shadows.
resolutions.dark: [PLACEHOLDER] The mirror darkens. You emerge from the Hall with secrets folded into your soul. You know everything. No one else knows you know. The Dark Side Nexus whispers: knowledge is the only real power.
resolutions.neutral: [PLACEHOLDER] The mirror cracks. You emerge from the Hall with partial truths and careful calculations. You know enough to be dangerous and wise enough to be cautious.
